query:
-- Denormalized leaderboard scores table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leaderboard_scores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NULL,
  deviceId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  playerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  totalPuzzles INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  correctPuzzles INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  accuracy DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  rating INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1200,
  totalMinutes DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  lastUpdated BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user (userId),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_device (deviceId),
  INDEX idx_total_puzzles (totalPuzzles DESC),
  INDEX idx_last_updated (lastUpdated DESC)
);

-- Heartbeat table for online users
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_heartbeats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NULL,
  deviceId VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  playerName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Anonymous',
  lastPing BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_hb_user (userId),
  UNIQUE KEY unique_hb_device (deviceId),
  INDEX idx_last_ping (lastPing DESC)
);
